action.text: Play Embargo as a Condition affecting one opponent. The next time that opponent plays a card, cancel that card and discard Embargo.

battle.text: Cancel one opposing played card. The canceled card returns to its origin: hand if played from hand, discard if played from the battle draw.
Draw +1 battle card. You may play +1 card from your battle draw.

action.text: Bank Fortifications as an Asset. When defending, gain +1 to your battle total.

battle.text: If you are defending, gain +1. If you lose, you may retreat +1 space.

action.text: Bank Attrition as an Asset. If your opponent loses a battle this turn, that opponent's battle-draw card in the lost battle goes to their Graveyard.

battle.text: If your opponent loses this battle, place every card from their initial battle draw in their Graveyard.

action.text: Play Assimilation as a Condition. If you win your next battle this turn as the attacker on a Territory your opponent controls, immediately capture that Territory instead of occupying it. Discard Assimilation at the end of the turn.

battle.text: If you win this battle as the attacker on a Territory your opponent controls, immediately capture that Territory instead of occupying it.
